Notes.Text:
This update for java-1_8_0-openjdk fixes the following issues:

Update to version jdk8u432 (icedtea-3.33.0):

- CVE-2024-21208: Enhance HTTP client (bsc#1231702).
- CVE-2024-21210: Improve handling of vectorization (bsc#1231711).
- CVE-2024-21217: Improve deserialization support (bsc#1231716).
- CVE-2024-21235: Improve graph optimizations (bsc#1231719).
- CVE-2024-21145: Improve 2D image (bsc#1228051).
